results.reason: Blocked at real UI surface: with the required URL override (backend=http://127.0.0.1:8899), node-create flow could not reach the expected flow backend endpoints, so onNodeCreate behavior (e.g., webhook-trigger hookId auto-population) could not be exercised in the editor.
evidence: agent-browser console: [Zynk] Initialized with base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8899; CORS failures for POST /command/create_agent and /command/list_agents from origin http://localhost:3000; ws://127.0.0.1:8899/ws/events handshake 403
curl -i -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8899/command/list_agents -> HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found
curl -i -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8899/command/list_agents (Origin: http://localhost:3000) -> HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found (no CORS allow headers)
python openapi check for :8899 -> API title 'vllm-mlx API' (not the expected flow backend surface)

commands.observation: App opened using the exact required URL override.

commands.command: agent-browser --session utv_pluginapi_g4 click/fill in Create New Agent dialog with namespace 'utv_pluginapi_g4' then click Create Agent
commands.observation: Create action did not progress to /agents/edit; modal remained open due backend request failures.
Console showed CORS preflight failures for http://127.0.0.1:8899/command/* and websocket 403 at /ws/events.
Captured UI state showing blocked create flow for evidence.
HTTP 404 Not Found; preflight not satisfied.

interactiveChecks.action: Load app at required backend-override URL and inspect initial UI behavior
interactiveChecks.observed: UI loaded and console confirmed backend base URL set to http://127.0.0.1:8899.

interactiveChecks.action: Attempt to create namespaced resource 'utv_pluginapi_g4-nodecreate-rerun' to reach flow editor and add applicable node
interactiveChecks.observed: Create action failed due fetch/CORS errors on /command/create_agent; flow editor was not reached.

interactiveChecks.action: Collect runtime evidence (console, errors, network, screenshot)
interactiveChecks.observed: Console/errors showed CORS and websocket failures; screenshot captured blocked modal state.

frictions: agent-browser wait command briefly returned 'Resource temporarily unavailable (os error 35)'; retried with direct URL checks and continued.
agent-browser network request list mostly captured Next.js internal stack-frame calls; command API calls failed at browser/CORS boundary.
blockers: Backend override target (:8899) is reachable but serves a different API surface (openapi title 'vllm-mlx API') and does not expose expected /command/* endpoints; browser preflight/requests fail, preventing node creation and thus preventing VAL-API-004 UI verification.
